name: graphicsWindowModifyGroup
title: graphicsWindowModifyGroup
syntax: void graphicsWindowModifyGroup(char[] windowName, byte mode, char[] groupName);
description: Modifies group enabled and expanded states.

parameters.name: windowName
parameters.description: The name of the Graphics Window.

parameters.name: byte mode
parameters.description: 1 = Enable group 2 = Disable group 3 = Expand group 4 = Collapse group 5 = Disable all groups 6 = Collapse all groups 7 = Expand all enabled groups 8 = Collapse all disabled groups

parameters.name: groupName
parameters.description: The name of the common axis/group to modify (optional parameter).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
